blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
